flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Hallmark University are 25% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($40.2k vs $53.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Hallmark University rose 27% between 2017 and 2020 ($20.0k → $25.4k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Hallmark University are 14% below 6-year earnings ($46.7k → $40.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Hallmark University rose 44% between 2021 and 2024 (46.0% → 66.3%).
